ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the media */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie or TV show */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of media (movie or TV show) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie or TV show */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the media was released */,
  "age_certification" TEXT /* Age certification for the media */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie or TV show in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the media */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries involved in the production of the media */,
  "seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons (applicable for TV shows) */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDb score of the media */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDb votes */,
  "tmdb_popularity" REAL /* TMDB popularity score */,
  "tmdb_score" REAL /* TMDB score of the media */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the poster image of the media */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the trailer of the media */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the media in dollars */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the media in dollars */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the media */,
  "director_id" TEXT /* ID of the director */,
  "writer_id" TEXT /* ID of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "media_id" TEXT /* ID of the TV show the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "episode_count" INTEGER /* Number of episodes in the season */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date when the season was first aired */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the user's preferred genres */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user (e.g., '18-24', '25-34') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "media_id" TEXT /* ID of the media being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_genres" (
  "media_id" TEXT /* ID of the media */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_production_countries" (
  "media_id" TEXT /* ID of the media */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_actors" (
  "media_id" TEXT /* ID of the media */,
  "actor_id" TEXT /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "actor_id")
)
column_names: Title of the movie or TV show
